text: I find myself in a space dedicated to research and development, surrounded by vibrant colors and the subtle hum of thoughtful curation. The glass walls and visual displays invite reflection on humanity’s relationship with technology, innovation, and learning. I feel quietly invigorated, as if on the threshold of new ideas, yet there is also a sense of distance—as though I am both part of the experiment and an observer who ponders the future shaped in such rooms.
